summary: Iteration 29: Blog Admin Panel CRUD Testing - Backend 100% PASS (15/15), Frontend 100% PASS. All CRUD operations working correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/blog/articles - articles sorted newest first (created_at DESC)
GET /api/blog/articles?published_only=false - returns all articles including unpublished
Articles have required fields (article_id, slug, title, excerpt, content, image, published, created_at)
GET /api/blog/articles/{slug} - returns single article by slug
Admin login works with admin@senioradvisor.cl / admin123
frontend_ui_tests: Admin login with admin@senioradvisor.cl / admin123 redirects to /dashboard
Admin panel /admin loads with 'Panel de Administracion' title
Blog tab shows existing 6 articles with edit/delete buttons
Create article modal opens with title, excerpt, image, content fields
CREATE: New article created and appears at top of list (newest first)
Toast shows 'Artículo creado' on successful creation
EDIT: Click edit button opens modal with pre-filled values
EDIT: Update title and save shows 'Artículo actualizado' toast
DELETE: Click delete removes article after confirm dialog
Toast shows 'Artículo eliminado' on successful deletion
Public /blog page shows 6 articles in grid layout
Public /blog/:slug page displays article with image, title, content

seed_data_creation: Created test article during CRUD testing (subsequently deleted). 6 seed articles exist in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 - Blog Admin Panel CRUD testing completed. Key findings: 1) Backend APIs fully functional - GET /api/blog/articles returns articles sorted by created_at DESC, POST creates articles with auto-generated slugs, PUT updates by article_id, DELETE removes by article_id. 2) Frontend admin panel at /admin has Blog tab with full CRUD UI - 'Nuevo Artículo' button opens modal form, edit/delete buttons on each row, toast notifications for all operations. 3) Public blog pages working - /blog shows grid of articles, /blog/:slug shows individual article. 4) 6 seed articles exist in database. 5) data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing.

api_endpoints.description: List all published articles (sorted newest first)
